Linear Models - Experiment 3 Sub-1 (Feature Selected) Run 1

Generated 2026-04-10 07:52  |  Train: 2021-2024  |  Test: 2025
Purpose: OLS, Ridge, and ElasticNet on Exp3 Sub-1 feature-selected subsets (Core + Useful features only, norm perm imp ≥ 0.03). Feature counts are now comparable to Exp2-FS (5-8 features vs 16-22 in the full Exp3-S1), recovering rows via fewer dropna constraints. Comparison with Exp3-S1 and Exp2-FS reveals whether the ADD-tier features earn their keep after selection.
